title: Section 8
content: 1[8. Application of Act to loans existing previous to the fifth of September, 1871.—The remedy mentioned in section 5 shall be available for the recovery of any money lent by the Secretary of State in Council to any local authority before the fifth day of September, eighteen hundred and seventy-one, and the interest due on such money.]
footnote: 1.Subs. byAct 38 of 1920, for the original section.
